title: Thai Peanut Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Thai-inspired stir fry made with peanut sauce, noodles, and vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a blender or food processor, combine peanut butter, peanut sauce, soy sauce, and honey.
Heat 1 tsp of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the mellow onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the satay broccoli and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the peanut sauce mixture and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Top with nutty almonds and serve immediately.
